title: OpenClaw agents.lock.toml
description: Compiled view of deployed agents, generated by the openclaw-gateway deploy action from per-agent .openclaw/agent-config.yaml files. Do not edit by hand.

schema_version.description: Lockfile schema revision. Currently the string "1".

agents.description: Map of agent slug to its compiled lockfile entry. Slug is the kebab-case identifier from the agent's handle (the substring after '@').

repo.description: GitHub owner/repo that hosts the agent-config.yaml.

config_source.description: Canonical URL to the source agent-config.yaml in the consumer repo (main branch).

config_sha.description: Git blob SHA of the source agent-config.yaml at deploy time.

last_deploy_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp the deploy action compiled this entry.

capabilities.description: List of capability identifiers this agent can handle. Used by capability-based dispatch.

role.description: Agent role: executor performs actions, advisor reviews, observer monitors.

allowed_channels.description: Discord channel IDs this agent is allowed to operate in.

heartbeat.description: Heartbeat configuration for agent health monitoring.

canary.description: Whether this agent is in canary (partial rollout) mode.

enforce_channel_pinning.description: Whether channel pinning is enforced for this agent (RFC #31 Phase 5, Issue #47). Only effective when dry_run is false.

dry_run.description: Whether channel pinning violations are logged without blocking (RFC #31 Phase 5, Issue #48). Default true for one week, then false to enforce.
